W7S 3m TJJTlftTtlJf, ^7. 2, 37c777^3 37^71*7377, 1426, TKlft|c| ^ 3 , yf? 7%JI27f TJJ 37 ^ , 3^-41 1030 3. 3TJ 3Tf%l^-c|H| irspra 4 ' y + ISfH 37T cTlfha 4 TT^rf ^ f t I [tFT. 77. 12/l5/2007-"<7T37^] TCRT3T 3j77I7, ^ 3 7 7 77f33 fdU|U|; ijel f ™ T177T 37 7T5F73, ST77I«7I77fT, •STTT H, Tsfe 3 , ^ T - 7 3 1 ^ ( i i ) 4 ' 37fa7JERT ^f7°3737 371.3tt 789(37) , 7TI777^ 20 ~RF$, 2009 £T7T T737Tf?ra 737^ ^ «7 3TT7 ^77377 37f*77JSRT 77. 371.37T. 567 ( 3 7 ) , 77KT73 1 5 TTTEJ, 201 1 "gTTJ ^ S M I ^ d T TTVft^n feTT^FTTI [cTFTfi 3 m 7737^ dlsimicrl 3TfafW7, 1956 (1959 371 23 ) 37T W I 2237 37 37*ffa f r ^ T i ] 3636 GI/2012 (I) -- 1 of 2 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PARTII—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th September, 2012 S.0.2286(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 22A of the Chartered Accountants Act, 1949 (38 of 1949) the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, number S.O. 789(E), dated the 20th March, 2009, namely :— 2. In the said notification . in serial numbers (6) and (7), for the entries relating thereto, the following entries shall be substituted, namely :— "(6) Shri A.N. Raman —Member Plot 10, [Appointed under Section 22A of the Cost and P.N. Muthukumaraswamy, Salai Baby Nagar, Works Accountants Act, 1956(23 of 1959)] 1st Main Road Velachery, Chennai-600042 (7) Shri Brij Mohan Sharma, •' - —Member" B.M.Sharma and Associate [Appointed under Section 22A of the Cost and B-2,Neelsadan Apartments, Works Accountants Act, 1956(23 of 1959)] 1426,SadashivPeth Opp. Pune Vidyarthi Griha, Pune-411030. 3. This notification shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Official Gazette. [ENo. 12/15/2007-PI] MANOJ KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note: The Principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide number S.O. 789(E), dated the 20th March, 2009 and subsequently amended vide number S.O. 567(E), dated the 15th March, 2011. Printed by the Manager. Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapun, New Delhi-I 10064 and Published bv the Controller of Publications. Delhi-1 10054. -- 2 of 2 --
